title: AMC Entertainment Holdings Full Year 2024 Earnings: EPS Misses Expectations
text: AMC Entertainment Holdings reported full year 2024 earnings results showing total revenues of $4,637.2 million compared to $4,812.6 million for 2023. Net loss was $352.6 million compared to $396.6 million for 2023. Adjusted EBITDA was $343.9 million compared to $454.3 million for 2023. Attendance at AMC theaters worldwide increased by 20% in the fourth quarter of 2024, with over 62 million guests visiting. AMC achieved all-time records for food and beverage revenue per patron, driven by innovative offerings and enhanced guest experiences. Cash and cash equivalents at December 31, 2024 was $632.3 million, and the company reduced principal balance of debt and finance leases by $375.9 million in 2024. Earnings per share (EPS) missed analyst estimates by 14%.
